## Meeting Purpose

[Follow-up discussion on potential SEO partnership between Dimmo and GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/2SYyijNxbQgkpTMUXYBSiEhp9MoXni8x?tab=summary&timestamp=589.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Dimmo aims to grow from \~10k to 30k monthly visitors by Q1 2025, with a 12-month goal of 100k](https://fathom.video/share/2SYyijNxbQgkpTMUXYBSiEhp9MoXni8x?tab=summary&timestamp=788.0)
  - [Focus shifting to sales-oriented content and audience (sellers, sales leaders, managers, CROs)](https://fathom.video/share/2SYyijNxbQgkpTMUXYBSiEhp9MoXni8x?tab=summary&timestamp=850.0)
  - [GrowthX proposes enriching Dimmo's \~125 indexed pages to 1200+, but has capacity constraints for 2-3 months](https://fathom.video/share/2SYyijNxbQgkpTMUXYBSiEhp9MoXni8x?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
  - [90-day pilot period offered within longer-term contracts, with upfront invoicing and opt-out option](https://fathom.video/share/2SYyijNxbQgkpTMUXYBSiEhp9MoXni8x?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

## Topics

### Dimmo's Current Traffic and Growth Goals

  - [Current traffic: \~10k monthly visitors (700-2000 organic)](https://fathom.video/share/2SYyijNxbQgkpTMUXYBSiEhp9MoXni8x?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Q1 2025 goal: 30k monthly visitors](https://fathom.video/share/2SYyijNxbQgkpTMUXYBSiEhp9MoXni8x?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [12-month goal: 100k monthly visitors](https://fathom.video/share/2SYyijNxbQgkpTMUXYBSiEhp9MoXni8x?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Shifting focus to sales-oriented audience and content](https://fathom.video/share/2SYyijNxbQgkpTMUXYBSiEhp9MoXni8x?tab=summary&timestamp=425.0)
  - [Main channels: Email newsletters, SEO, and organic LinkedIn reach](https://fathom.video/share/2SYyijNxbQgkpTMUXYBSiEhp9MoXni8x?tab=summary&timestamp=504.0)

### Dimmo's Business Model and Pricing

  - [Moving towards $10k/year pricing for new customers (up from $3-5k)](https://fathom.video/share/2SYyijNxbQgkpTMUXYBSiEhp9MoXni8x?tab=summary&timestamp=710.0)
  - [Not currently converting site visitors to customers](https://fathom.video/share/2SYyijNxbQgkpTMUXYBSiEhp9MoXni8x?tab=summary&timestamp=816.0)
  - [Lead generation model: Reaching out to companies with demo view data](https://fathom.video/share/2SYyijNxbQgkpTMUXYBSiEhp9MoXni8x?tab=summary&timestamp=831.0)
  - [Traffic growth directly correlates with lead quality and conversion potential](https://fathom.video/share/2SYyijNxbQgkpTMUXYBSiEhp9MoXni8x?tab=summary&timestamp=906.0)

### GrowthX's SEO Approach

  - [Enrich existing pages (currently \~125 indexed) to 1200+](https://fathom.video/share/2SYyijNxbQgkpTMUXYBSiEhp9MoXni8x?tab=summary&timestamp=1049.0)
  - [Focus on long-tail keywords and niche content](https://fathom.video/share/2SYyijNxbQgkpTMUXYBSiEhp9MoXni8x?tab=summary&timestamp=1220.0)
  - [Human-driven content creation and verification, supported by AI](https://fathom.video/share/2SYyijNxbQgkpTMUXYBSiEhp9MoXni8x?tab=summary&timestamp=1379.0)
  - [Emphasis on quality, consistency, and volume of content production](https://fathom.video/share/2SYyijNxbQgkpTMUXYBSiEhp9MoXni8x?tab=summary&timestamp=1405.0)

### Partnership Structure and Expectations

  - [90-day pilot period within longer-term contracts (6-12 months)](https://fathom.video/share/2SYyijNxbQgkpTMUXYBSiEhp9MoXni8x?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Upfront invoicing with net 30 terms](https://fathom.video/share/2SYyijNxbQgkpTMUXYBSiEhp9MoXni8x?tab=summary&timestamp=1629.0)
  - [Earliest start date: February due to current capacity constraints](https://fathom.video/share/2SYyijNxbQgkpTMUXYBSiEhp9MoXni8x?tab=summary&timestamp=1683.0)
  - [Minimum engagement: 30-minute calls weekly or bi-weekly](https://fathom.video/share/2SYyijNxbQgkpTMUXYBSiEhp9MoXni8x?tab=summary&timestamp=1631.0)
  - [Expected results timeline:](https://fathom.video/share/2SYyijNxbQgkpTMUXYBSiEhp9MoXni8x?tab=summary&timestamp=1508.0)
    1.  Volume and quality of content production
    2.  Increase in search impressions
    3.  Growth in clicks and traffic

## Next Steps

  - [Troy to discuss budget and feasibility with Dimmo co-founders](https://fathom.video/share/2SYyijNxbQgkpTMUXYBSiEhp9MoXni8x?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)
  - [Dimmo to evaluate long-term organic traffic strategy and investment options](https://fathom.video/share/2SYyijNxbQgkpTMUXYBSiEhp9MoXni8x?tab=summary&timestamp=1699.0)
  - [Consider GrowthX's February availability for potential partnership start](https://fathom.video/share/2SYyijNxbQgkpTMUXYBSiEhp9MoXni8x?tab=summary&timestamp=1686.0)
  - [Troy to weigh trade-offs between in-house efforts, traditional agencies, and GrowthX's offer](https://fathom.video/share/2SYyijNxbQgkpTMUXYBSiEhp9MoXni8x?tab=summary&timestamp=1742.0)
